title: Cloths
description: Ports the cloth item straight from BTA! (Better Than Adventure!)
body:
Pretty straightforward. This mod ports the cloth item from BTA ([Better Than Adventure!](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/)) to modern MC!

If you're not familiar with how BTA handles bed recipes & zombie drops, I'll give you the rundown;

**Obtaining** - [In vanilla Minecraft, you would be able to craft a bed using just wooden planks and wool. However, in BTA, you'll have to face the monsters of the night in order to get the final resource necessary to craft a bed: cloth. If you aren't confident in your skill, you may be better off mining throughout the night to gather better gear. However, if you are confident, find some zombies that have spawned during the night and kill them with your sword to gather cloth!](https://bta.miraheze.org/wiki/Guide:Getting_started#:~:text=It%27s%20likely%20either,to%20gather%20cloth!)

**Bed Recipe** - [Craft yourself a bed using three wooden planks, one wool and two cloth.](https://bta.miraheze.org/wiki/Guide:Getting_started#:~:text=Swiftly%20retreat%20to,and%20lit%20up!)
